hero.title: Premium Mobility,
hero.description_primary: We deliver more than transportation. We create a premium, reliable, and effortless experience.
hero.description_secondary: Trusted by individuals and businesses who value quality, consistency, and comfort.

experience_card.label: Experience
experience_card.title: Trusted by modern businesses
experience_card.description: Delivering premium mobility solutions with consistency and trust.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: A journey built on quality and trust
story.paragraph_one: We started with a simple idea. Transportation should feel effortless, reliable, and premium.
story.paragraph_two: Today, we focus on delivering a consistent experience across every ride, every client, every time.

faq.title: Questions Before You Book
faq.description: Helpful answers about our booking process, support, and vehicle experience.
